title: HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION - 211info
text: CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers eviction prevention services, which may include help with current or past-due rent and utilities (like electricity, water, gas, garbage, sewer, or heating fuel), landlord support, and case management. Services depend on available funding and are not guaranteed. 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Must be a current tenant who is unstably housed or at imminent risk of homelessness Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 345-3628 Main phone Main phone (541) 345-3628 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, photo ID, notices, letters, or other documentation that shows unpaid bills, late payments, or additional proof of risk of homelessness AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of 10th and G Streets. On LTD Bus Line 18. Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - OASIS DROP-IN DAY CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM MATERIAL GOODS - CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD
